name: touristguidelocal
description: Local dev: npm run dev -> UI :3055 + API :8000. Do not use Docker api/frontend for coding (see AGENTS.md).

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:8010: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:api:8010" "npm run dev:frontend"
